title: MidLayer Contact v1
description: Canonical mid-layer Contact schema, aligned with merge.dev CRM Contact common model.

account_external_id.description: External id of a linked Account (company).

addresses.description: Minified JSON array of merge.dev Address objects. Keys alphabetically sorted; absent sub-fields omitted.

email_addresses.description: Minified JSON array of {email_address, email_address_type} objects (merge.dev CRM EmailAddress).

phone_numbers.description: Minified JSON array of {phone_number, phone_number_type} objects (merge.dev CRM PhoneNumber).

remote_was_deleted.description: true when the source tombstoned the record. Row is still emitted so deletes propagate.

_unmapped.description: Minified JSON object preserving source columns the mapper could not map. `{}` or empty string when none.

_source_record_id.description: Raw source row id before any normalization.

_ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the ingestion run (one timestamp per run, stamped on every row).

_source_file.description: Relative path of the source seed/file or connector-job URI.

_mapping_version.description: Semver of the mapping artifact used (e.g. 'google_sheets.contact@0.1.0').

_row_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonicalized mapped row (see schema guide §7.1).
